'''zaboso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zemi|zemi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-b-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zemi|zemi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zaboso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæbeseth|zæbeseth]] || [[word:zæbesej|zæbesej]] || [[word:zæbesesh|zæbesesh]] || [[word:zæbese|zæbese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zabobosoth|zabobosoth]] || [[word:zabobosoj|zabobosoj]] || [[word:zabobososh|zabobososh]] || [[word:zaboboso|zaboboso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zabosoth|zabosoth]] || [[word:zabosoj|zabosoj]] || [[word:zabososh|zabososh]] || [[word:zaboso|zaboso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zabofsoth|zabofsoth]] || [[word:zabofsoj|zabofsoj]] || [[word:zabofsosh|zabofsosh]] || [[word:zabofsof|zabofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zabosotho|zabosotho]] || [[word:zabosojo|zabosojo]] || [[word:zabososho|zabososho]] || [[word:zabosoko|zabosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zabosoth|zabosoth]] || [[word:zabosoj|zabosoj]] || [[word:zabososh|zabososh]] || [[word:zaboso|zaboso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zabosothol|zabosothol]] || [[word:zabosojol|zabosojol]] || [[word:zabososhol|zabososhol]] || [[word:zabosokol|zabosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zabosothotho|zabosothotho]] || [[word:zabosojojo|zabosojojo]] || [[word:zabososhosho|zabososhosho]] || [[word:zabosoko|zabosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zabosothon|zabosothon]] || [[word:zabosojon|zabosojon]] || [[word:zabososhon|zabososhon]] || [[word:zabosokon|zabosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zabosothoro|zabosothoro]] || [[word:zabosojoro|zabosojoro]] || [[word:zabososhoro|zabososhoro]] || [[word:zabosokoro|zabosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
